name: powerloom-weave
description: Powerloom weave CLI integration for Codex. Ask and chat with Powerloom agents, author manifests, and troubleshoot loomcli safely.

interface.shortDescription: Drive Powerloom agents and manifests from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds Powerloom weave CLI guidance for Codex: provider-agnostic agent ask/chat, manifest plan/apply/destroy, auth, skill archive lifecycle, approvals, and common diagnostics.
defaultPrompt: Use weave ask to query my Powerloom agent.
